members.name: GetParam
members.summary: Returns the value of the specified parameter.

members.name: SetParam
members.signature: public void SetParam(int param, float value)
members.summary: Sets the value of the specified parameter.

rawMembers.name: params/bias
rawMembers.summary: The force with which the pinned objects stay in positional relation to each other. The higher, the stronger.

rawMembers.name: params/damping
rawMembers.summary: The force with which the pinned objects stay in velocity relation to each other. The higher, the stronger.

rawMembers.name: params/impulse_clamp
rawMembers.summary: If above 0, this value is the maximum value for an impulse that this Joint3D produces.

values.name: PARAM_BIAS
values.summary: The force with which the pinned objects stay in positional relation to each other. The higher, the stronger.

values.name: PARAM_DAMPING
values.summary: The force with which the pinned objects stay in velocity relation to each other. The higher, the stronger.

values.name: PARAM_IMPULSE_CLAMP
values.summary: If above 0, this value is the maximum value for an impulse that this Joint3D produces.

constants.name: PARAM_BIAS
constants.summary: The force with which the pinned objects stay in positional relation to each other. The higher, the stronger.

constants.name: PARAM_DAMPING
constants.summary: The force with which the pinned objects stay in velocity relation to each other. The higher, the stronger.

constants.name: PARAM_IMPULSE_CLAMP
constants.summary: If above 0, this value is the maximum value for an impulse that this Joint3D produces.
